name: Copley Acquisition Corp
business: Copley Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed to acquire a business, with no current operations or revenues. It intends to focus on technology and lifestyle sectors, excluding the People's Republic of China.

exposures.sentence: Electric vehicles, robotics and cybersecurity, are driving innovation at rapid speed.

catalysts.sentence: Our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association provide that we have only 18 months from the closing of our initial public offering (which can be extended two times, each by an additional three months, for a total completion window of up to 24 months) to complete our initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: Global IT spending expected to reach over $8 trillion before end of decade
tamClaims.sentence: According to Gartner, the global IT spending is expected to reach over $8 trillion before the end of the decade.
